Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Monarchs]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Monarchs are beings whose whims lives depend on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Monarchs are the most powerful individuals in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Monarchs can temporarily destroy a Dreadgod's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Monarchs are beings that battle Dreadgods.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Harmony can see as Monarchs do.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The upcoming competition will be a battle between Monarchs.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Monarchs are a level of power or entity mentioned by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan believes Dross will eventually tower over Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — All current Monarchs will be in attendance at the upcoming tournament.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Twelve Monarchs attacked the Wandering Titan during the Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Monarchs in Cradle have refused recruitment by the Abidan.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Many Monarchs have made strange comments about the Ninecloud team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The collective attention of the Monarchs can restore a damaged individual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The attention of the Monarchs is the prize for a victor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Monarchs can be upset by interruptions to their view.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Monarchs can reverse injuries through a process involving rewriting the fundamental principles of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Monarchs are spirits that scanned Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Monarchs historically wore badges of blue.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin is sick of Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — The Dreadgod sees eight Monarchs hovering over Mount Samara in a vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Among the Monarchs, only one claims to have influence over the Dreadgods.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Elder Whisper offered Lindon the secrets of Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon questions why the Monarchs have not taken action regarding the anchor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Attacks from Dreadgods or Monarchs have carved ravines into the territory around Refuge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan claims his machinations make Monarchs tremble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — The Monarchs will punish the team if they enter the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Monarchs benefit from the current system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Monarchs can clash over advice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Monarchs control the records of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Dreadgods will die only when there are no more Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Monarchs are part of the scenes remade in the World of Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon intends to drag the Monarchs with him when he advances.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Monarchs are expected to come for Lindon soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Monarchs represent a looming threat to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Heralds mention they are not being observed by the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The presence of the Monarchs sustains the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is waiting for trouble from Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Monarchs are potential sponsors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Monarchs are connected to hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Monarchs are a group of powerful beings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — The existence of Monarchs upsets a sort of balance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Blood Sage claimed to have bestowed power that could rival Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Other Monarchs were wrestling against the workings of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Monarchs are letting the Dreadgods stick around.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Abidan consider Monarchs to be parasites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Monarchs staying too long causes hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — There is a conspiracy theory that Monarchs and the Dreadgods are working together.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Monarchs financed the operation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The characters expect to fight among Monarchs soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Monarchs are powerful entities that require willpower to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin has faced down the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Monarchs use time-warped pocket dimensions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Monarchs are known to cycle for years at a time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — The Sword Sage mentions tickling Monarchs in their secrets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Monarchs were hit by black dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Monarchs can use techniques that are casual exchanges on their level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Monarchs are determined to deny Lindon time to prepare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon challenged the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon is fighting Monarchs in a mythic war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon needs time once the Monarchs are gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Monarchs must be removed from the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Monarchs are the kings and queens of the world capable of fighting Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — The purpose of the soul oath is to prevent the rise of Monarchs.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Monarchs award prizes in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Monarchs are watching the events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Combat between Monarchs can cause spatial cracks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon tells the remaining Monarchs they must ascend or Eithan will kill them.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
